content.text: NTPC Engineering Executive Trainee Vacancy 2026 : Get complete details about NTPC Engineering Executive Trainee Recruitment 2026, including recruitment updates, total vacancies, important dates, application fees, eligibility criteria, age limit, selection process, salary, admit card, result, and more.

rows.text: National Thermal Power Corporation (NTPC) Engineering Executive Trainee Recruitment 2026 Advt. No. : 07A/26 & 07B/26 Short Details
Gen / OBC / EWS : 500/- SC / ST / ESM : 0/- (Nil) All Females : 0/- (Nil) Payment Mode : Online / Offline
Age Limit : Max. 27 Years Age Limit as on : 29/05/2026 The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
Shortlisting (GATE Score) Medical Examination Document Verification

Selected candidates will be placed in the pay scale of Rs.40,000-1,40,000 at the basic pay of Rs. 40,000/- (E1 Grade). The other benefits such as Dearness Allowance, other perquisites and allowances, terminal benefits, etc. will be admissible as per company rules in force from time to time during training/after absorption.
